mapper.select:
SELECT inquiry_id, campaign_title, company_nm, title, content, user_id, user_nm, phone_num, address, gathering_time, (CASE WHEN inquiry_type = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN inquiry_type = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN inquiry_type = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE '' END) as inquiry_type, pay_date, created_at, updated_at FROM inquiry where
(campaign_title like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') or content like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%') or user_nm like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%'))
campaign_title like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
content like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
user_nm like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
order by inquiry_id desc

SELECT inquiry_id, campaign_title, company_nm, title, content, user_id, user_nm, phone_num, created_at, salary, pay_date, address, costume, gathering_time, (CASE WHEN inquiry_type = '01' THEN '경호' WHEN inquiry_type = '02' THEN '진행' WHEN inquiry_type = '03' THEN '수행' ELSE '' END) as inquiry_type FROM inquiry where inquiry_id = #{inquiryId}
